mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_safety_work_list ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_safety_work_list ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_safety_work_list WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{title} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_safety_work_list WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{title} + '%'
SELECT * FROM tb_safety_work_list WHERE location LIKE '%' + #{location} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_safety_work_list WHERE location LIKE '%' + #{location} + '%'
SELECT * FROM tb_safety_work_list WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_safety_work_list WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM tb_safety_work_list WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{title} + '%' AND location LIKE '%' + #{location} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_safety_work_list WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{title} + '%' AND location LIKE '%' + #{location} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_safety_work_list (safety_work_id, title, title_en, title_zh, location, start_date, end_date, partners, partners_name, manager_name, manager_dept, approver_name, approver_mail, approver_dept, approve_date, status, reject_comment, reject_by, reject_date, author_name, author_mail, author_dept, author_company, completed_date, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{safetyWorkId}, #{title}, #{titleEn}, #{titleZh}, #{location}, #{startDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{partners}, #{partnersName}, #{managerName}, #{managerDept}, #{approverName}, #{approverMail}, #{approverDept}, #{approveDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status}, #{rejectComment}, #{rejectBy}, #{rejectDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{authorName}, #{authorMail}, #{authorDept}, #{authorCompany}, #{completedDate,jdbcType=DATE}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_safety_work_list SET title = #{title}, title_en = #{titleEn}, title_zh = #{titleZh}, location = #{location}, start_date = #{startDate,jdbcType=DATE}, end_date = #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, partners = #{partners}, partners_name = #{partnersName}, manager_name = #{managerName}, manager_dept = #{managerDept}, approver_name = #{approverName}, approver_mail = #{approverMail}, approver_dept = #{approverDept}, approve_date = #{approveDate,jdbcType=DATE}, status = #{status}, reject_comment = #{rejectComment}, reject_by = #{rejectBy}, reject_date = #{rejectDate,jdbcType=DATE}, author_name = #{authorName}, author_mail = #{authorMail}, author_dept = #{authorDept}, author_company = #{authorCompany}, completed_date = #{completedDate,jdbcType=DATE}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
